name: Leather crossbody bag
description:
1988 Hermès Jockey Crossbody Bag – Black Courchevel Leather – Gold Hardware

A timeless vintage Hermès classic, this 1988 Jockey Crossbody Bag is crafted in elegant black Courchevel leather, known for its structured shape, lightweight feel, and subtle crosshatch texture. Courchevel holds its form beautifully, making this piece both durable and refined.
The sleek silhouette is complemented by rich gold-plated hardware, creating a striking contrast against the deep black leather. Designed for effortless wear, it features a single shoulder strap ideal for crossbody styling, offering both comfort and hands-free practicality.
Thoughtful details include leather trim embellishment and a fully leather-lined interior, showcasing Hermès’ exceptional craftsmanship. The top zip closure secures your essentials while maintaining the bag’s clean, streamlined profile.
Stamped with the Circle R date code, confirming production in 1988, this is a true collector’s vintage piece from the golden era of Hermès leather goods. Excellent used condition. Shoulder Strap Drop: 21.25"
Height: 6"
Width: 6.5"
Depth: 2.5" 

SKU0013000
